title: 3pc Animal Head Fixed Blade Ornamental Dagger Collector Knife Decorative Gift
description:
Knife Collectors Rejoice! Now introducing the special edition etched dagger set: Wolf, Eagle, and Dragon Daggers with their respective sheaths. This is a beautifully crafted dagger set featuring 3 different outdoor graphic scenes etched onto the Scabbard and handle. The handles' pommels are made with impressive animal heads of the distinctive graphic depicted throughout the handle. Each ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Animal Dagger has a handle in the shape of it's respective animal and the blade is acid etched with a impressively detailed design. Both the handle and sheath feature a colorful and majestic design depicting the spirit of the animal. The blade of these daggers are 8 inches length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point

3pc Animal Head Fixed Blade Ornamental Dagger Collector Knife Decorative Gift

Knife Collectors Rejoice! Now introducing the special edition etched dagger set: Wolf, Eagle, and Dragon Daggers with their respective sheaths. This is a beautifully crafted dagger set featuring 3 different outdoor graphic scenes etched onto the Scabbard and handle. The handles' pommels are made with impressive animal heads of the distinctive graphic depicted throughout the handle.

Key Features

  • SPECIAL EDITION DECORATIVE KNIFE: These wild animal daggers are quite the addition to any knife collection set: The Animal Head Fixed Blade Hunting Daggers feature an intricate outdoor graphic design of their spirit in full color from scabbard and handle
  • PREMIUM QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP: Constructed from 440 stainless steel these fixed blade animal head knives have an eye catching and heavy weighted 8 inch acid etched blade while overall being 13.75 inches in length
  • ORNAMENTAL POMMEL AND SHEATH: From tip to pommel a matching wild animal outdoor graphic adorns this stainless steel dagger in full color that will surly impress one and all. Each fixed blade animal head dagger has a 5.5" handle with a solid ornamental animal head pommel full color graphic scabbard and handle
  • WILDLIFE FIXED BLADE DECORATIVE COLLECTORS KNIFE: Included in this 3 piece knife collection is a Wolf, Eagle, and Fantasy Dragon ornamental dagger each a unique character in the wild
  • UNIQUE AND ENJOYABLE: Makes a great addition to any knife collection or wildlife enthusiast center piece

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DGGRANIM283BNDL
  • UPC: 885189806540
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 13.5 in

Each ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Animal Dagger has a handle in the shape of it's respective animal and the blade is acid etched with a impressively detailed design. Both the handle and sheath feature a colorful and majestic design depicting the spirit of the animal. The blade of these daggers are 8 inches length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point to pommel.

These knives are truly unique and are sure to amaze and delight anyone who sets their eyes on it. This set is a must-have for any knife lover, and will display prominently anywhere that it is placed; this set truly makes for a great gift for the knife collector who has it all or is just beginning to collect
